technical_replicate: Samples were run in triplicate injections.
experimental_design: In order to investigate novel mechanisms of hormonal therapy resistance (HTR) in breast cancer...
factor_value: we examined the expression of ERα protein in different BC cell lines, either in the absence or presence of the selective estrogen receptor degrader (SERD) fulvestrant...
number_of_samples: Total biological replicates = 152 and number of fractions = 1.
